on the actuator/prometheus endpoint.

Fix post creation to use JSON request body instead of query params

Add @RequestBody to FeedController, send content as JSON body in load
test client, and configure Redis ObjectMapper with JavaTimeModule for
proper date serialization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix neo4j container startup failure caused by read-only volume mount

Neo4j 5 chowns everything under /var/lib/neo4j/ on startup, which
fails on the :ro mounted init-graph.cypher. The file is already
mounted separately in the neo4j-init sidecar container.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement news feed system with fanout architecture

Spring Boot 3.4 / Java 21 app with Nginx load balancer, Post Service
(PostgreSQL + Redis cache), Fanout Service (RabbitMQ → workers → News Feed
Cache), Neo4j graph DB for friendships, Prometheus/Grafana monitoring,
load test client, unit tests, and Docker Compose orchestration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add test deck seeding script

Creates 6 decks directly in Anki via AnkiConnect, covering:
- Basic Q&A (Biology, History)
- Cloze with multi-marker notes (Programming::Python)
- HTML-formatted fields: bold, code, lists (Programming::General)
- Basic (and reversed card) — 1 note → 2 cards (Languages::Spanish)
- Subdecks via :: nesting (Programming::*, Languages::*)
- Deliberately poor cards for AI editing tests (AI Editing Targets,
  History last 4 cards): too broad, over-stuffed, "list everything" fronts

Run: uv run python scripts/seed_test_decks.py

fix: 주니어 B 검색 사례에 Grafana 모니터링 맥락 추가 (#28)

서버가 느리다에서 바로 connection pool exhaustion으로 점프하던
흐름에 Grafana 대시보드에서 DB Connection Active/Wait Time
지표를 확인하는 과정을 추가하여 자연스러운 추론 흐름 완성.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(validation): allow Bond UTXO unlock in withdrawal + v16 genesis reset

Bond UTXOs (lock_until=u64::MAX) were rejected by is_spendable_at() check
during WithdrawalRequest/Exit validation. Skip lock check for these TX types
since they are specifically designed to unlock Bond UTXOs.

fix(homechef-api): use ExternalSecrets for DB/Redis/JWT passwords instead of GCP SDK

The Go API reads DB_PASSWORD and REDIS_URL from env vars directly — it has no
GCP Secret Manager SDK. Create an ExternalSecret to pull secrets from GCP into
a K8s secret, and reference them via secretKeyRef in the Knative service.

Also set HOMECHEF_ENV=production and remove stale DATABASE_HOST/REDIS_HOST
ArgoCD params (now handled by values-prod.yaml).

- lastAIEventFloorで発生履歴を追跡

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix loading placeholders being wiped from session feed after refresh

checkSession and restoreSession run concurrently. checkSession's final
setSessionFeed(recentImages) call — a plain overwrite — could fire after
restoreSession had already prepended the in-flight loading placeholders,
erasing them.

Changed the setter to the functional form so it always carries existing
loading items forward before merging in the fresh DB images:
  setSessionFeed(prev => [...prev.filter(loading), ...recentImages])

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix activation: prevent GETID@ from interrupting HMAC response

When GETID gets a CHIPID challenge, the HMAC response is sent
automatically. But GETID@ was sent 100ms later, restarting the
activation flow and invalidating the HMAC. Now uses a flag to
skip the second GETID@ if a challenge was already received.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Session 165: FPS source_match_key pre-filter + intra-league merge script

1. FPS: Pre-filter staging rows whose source_match_key already exists in
   matches_v2. Prevents batch failures from key conflicts after team merges.

2. mergeIntraLeagueDupes.cjs: New script to merge orphan↔match-team pairs
   with exact canonical_name in the same league. These are created when
   processStandings and FPS resolve the same team separately with different
   metadata. Found 263 pairs in first run.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: paper trade multiplier + strategy name display

Two bugs fixed:

1. Paper multiplier always 1.0 — line 17955 referenced `is_postgres`
   which is never defined as a module variable. NameError caught silently
   by except block, multiplier stayed at 1.0. Fix: use `_pp_m_db_url`
   (already defined at line 17943).

2. "85" shown instead of strategy name — bridge only passed
   strategy_id (recorder_id number). Added strategy_name param to
   bridge function + all 4 call sites pass recorder.get('name').
   Paper engine stores strategy_name on position dict. History tab
   displays strategy_name with fallback to strategy_id.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix live location dot, real-time tracking, and auth session

- Switch user dot to SVG CircleMarker (fixes clipping/visibility issues)
- Add real-time location tracking with watchPosition
- Add location denied toast when browser blocks GPS
- Fix auth session mismatch by switching browser client to createBrowserClient
  from @supabase/ssr so cookies are shared with server-side login

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Desktop notifications: toggle on/off, per-channel/stream bells

Portal.js:
- NotificationBell.toggleDesktopAlerts() replaces one-way enable flow:
  granted+enabled → click disables; granted+disabled → click enables+tests;
  not granted → requests permission with auto-test on grant
- _isEnabled() checks both browser permission AND localStorage preference
  (portal_desktop_alerts_enabled) so users can turn alerts off without
  revoking browser permission
- _syncDesktopBtn() now handles 4 states: Enable alerts / Alerts on /
  Alerts off / Alerts blocked; on/off are both clickable to toggle
- CSS: removed cursor:default from --on state, added --off state style

chat.html:
- Per-channel bell icons in sidebar (hidden until hover, filled when active)
  stored in localStorage (portal_notif_channels / portal_notif_streams)
- Regular channels: alert on new messages when tab is unfocused
- Stream channels: alert when stream transitions to live
- SVG bell icon (filled=subscribed, outline=unsubscribed), themed to accent
  color; hidden by default, revealed on row hover

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(umami): increase resources and add startup probe

Raise memory request to 512Mi and set limits equal to requests to get
Guaranteed QoS, preventing the scheduler from placing the pod on
overcommitted nodes. Add a startup probe so the liveness probe does
not kill the container during Next.js cold start.

commit.message:
feat: rediseño completo formulario análisis — UX simplificada

Estructura reorganizada en 5 secciones claras:
1. ¿Dónde está? — comuna con autocomplete/búsqueda, dirección opcional
2. ¿Cómo es? — colapsada con defaults (2D1B, 3-5 años, piso medio)
   Dormitorios/baños con botones, antigüedad/piso con dropdown de rangos,
   estacionamiento/bodega con toggles
3. ¿Cuánto cuesta? — precio con MoneyInput formateado, pie con slider,
   estado venta con botones
4. ¿Cómo lo financias? — colapsada con defaults (25 años, 4.72%)
5. ¿Cuánto genera? — arriendo, gastos, contribuciones, vacancia

Campos eliminados: región, ciudad, tipo (hardcodeado Departamento),
superficie total, provisión mantención (auto). Nombre colapsado.

Mejoras UX:
- MoneyInput con separador de miles chileno (Intl.NumberFormat)
- Toggle CLP/UF en campos monetarios
- Secciones colapsables con resumen de defaults
- Botón submit sticky en móvil
- Font-size 16px en inputs (evita zoom iOS)
- Spinners de inputs numéricos ocultos
- Preview flujo estimado (arriendo - dividendo)
- Responsive: columna única en móvil

Redo Semazen sprites as hand-crafted 16x16 pixel art

New version is hand-drawn pixel by pixel with proper walk animation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Set DHCP hostname to weather-leds-XXXXXX on connect (v1.2.0, closes #22) (#23)

* Set DHCP hostname to weather-leds-XXXXXX on connect (v1.2.0, closes #22)

Add applyHostname() which calls WiFi.setHostname("weather-leds-XXXXXX")
before every WiFi.begin(), where XXXXXX is the last 3 MAC address bytes
in lowercase hex. This replaces the generic "esp32-XXXXXX" default with a
project-specific name that makes the device easy to identify on a network.

Also adds WiFi mock support (setHostname, macAddress, g_mock_wifi_hostname)
and a new test_hostname suite verifying the prefix and MAC-derived suffix.

https://claude.ai/code/session_013J7iRBavJx4HcbLbaNtuaC

* fix: read MAC from eFuse instead of WiFi.macAddress() for hostname

WiFi.macAddress() returns all-zeroes before WiFi.begin() because the
radio hasn't been initialised yet. Switch to esp_efuse_mac_get_default()
which reads the base MAC directly from eFuse and is available at any
time, so the hostname suffix is always correct.

Bumps patch version to 1.2.1.

https://claude.ai/code/session_013J7iRBavJx4HcbLbaNtuaC

* fix: use ESP.getEfuseMac() for hostname suffix, revert patch bump

esp_efuse.h is not reliably available in the Arduino ESP32 3.x build
environment. ESP.getEfuseMac() is the idiomatic Arduino ESP32 API for
reading the base MAC before WiFi init and needs no extra includes.

Also reverts the erroneous 1.2.1 patch bump — bug fixes within the same
PR as the feature that introduced them don't get a separate version
increment. Documents this rule in CLAUDE.md.

https://claude.ai/code/session_013J7iRBavJx4HcbLbaNtuaC

* docs: add commit conventions section; fix Closes #22 placement

GitHub only auto-closes issues when the Closes keyword is on its own
line in the commit body. Documents this rule in CLAUDE.md.

Closes #22

https://claude.ai/code/session_013J7iRBavJx4HcbLbaNtuaC

---------

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix flaky CLI test deadlock (#52)

* Fix flaky CLI test deadlock by disabling background task processors in tests

The .env.example had TASK_PROCESSORS=1 but no _TEST override, so background
workers ran during tests. This caused deadlocks when file:reindex tasks
raced with TRUNCATE TABLE during test setup. Added TASK_PROCESSORS_TEST=0
and a defensive queue drain in buildTestUniverse().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Revert TASK_PROCESSORS_TEST=0 — backend search tests need active workers

The backend search tests call drainIndexingQueue() which waits for background
tasks to complete. Setting TASK_PROCESSORS_TEST=0 prevents tasks from being
processed, causing those tests to timeout. The CLI test fix (queue drain
before TRUNCATE) is sufficient on its own.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
